EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created a personal access token for the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created an access token for the project with ID {numfield1} for the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} revoked a personal access token from the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} revoked an access token for the project with ID {numfield1} from the user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
